description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/sporedb/sporedb:ci Docker image and a global before_script that sources ci/prepare. Define two stages: test and lint. Add a unit tests job in the test stage that retries once and runs make test. Add a code lint job in the lint stage that runs go get github.com/stretchr/testify/require followed by make lint. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are required.
